backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor that wires together authorization and blob-storage mixins, and implements user profiles, feedback submission/approval/rejection, and appointment booking with blocked-date management.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the HomePage section reorder (FeaturedCollections before AboutSection) is implemented in frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-line summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a reference index for the project's React components, pages, hooks, and config files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base/components/utilities entry with CSS custom properties defining light and dark OKLCH color tokens for the shadcn-ui design system.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'Luxyle' that mounts the React app at #root via the Vite module entry point src/main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with a Layout (Header/Footer), defines routes for home, contact, and admin pages, and provides QueryClient and Sonner Toaster.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About Us section with a two-column layout showing a generated image with gold accents and brand story text alongside three brand-pillar cards.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Full-screen access-denied UI with a ShieldX icon, heading, divider, message, and a button to navigate back to the home page.
frontend/src/components/AdminLoginForm.t: Stub component that renders nothing; kept for import compatibility since admin authentication is now handled directly in AdminDashboard.
frontend/src/components/AppointmentBooki: Appointment booking form with date input (blocked-dates enforcement), time-slot grid, and contact fields, showing a success confirmation screen after submission.
frontend/src/components/CollectionGaller: Displays an 8-image gallery grid with hover overlays and labels, plus a lightbox with prev/next navigation for the full collection section.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedCollecti: Renders a 4-image featured collection grid with hover effects that smooth-scrolls to the full collection section when clicked.
frontend/src/components/FeedbackForm.tsx: A review submission form with name, star rating, and text fields that posts feedback via a React Query mutation and shows a success state on completion.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, quick nav links, services list, and contact/location details including Instagram and Google Maps links.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed navigation header that changes style on scroll, with desktop nav links, Instagram icon, a 'Book Appointment' CTA, and a responsive mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, overlays, the Luxyle brand name, tagline, and CTA buttons for booking an appointment and getting directions.
frontend/src/components/ReviewsSection.t: Renders a reviews section combining hardcoded seed reviews with dynamically fetched approved feedback from the backend, displaying each as a styled card with star ratings and skeleton loading states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) access, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend interactions including admin checks, feedback CRUD (submit/approve/reject), and appointment management (submit, approve, reject, blocked dates).
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind base/component/utility layers along with a luxury design token palette (gold, ivory, beige, royal-blue) as CSS custom properties.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with tabbed UI for managing pending feedback (approve/reject) and appointments, including blocked date management, protected by admin role checks and Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Renders the Contact page with a hero banner, four info cards (location, hours, phone, Instagram), an embedded Google Map, and an appointment booking section.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Composes the Home page by assembling Hero, Stats Bar, FeaturedCollections, AboutSection, CollectionGallery, ReviewsSection, FeedbackForm, and AppointmentBooking in the specified order.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions to read, store, persist, and clear URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, using sessionStorage for cross-navigation persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Jost), a luxury color palette (gold, ivory, beige, royal-blue), custom shadows, and fade-in animations for the Luxyle brand.
project_state.json: Tracks the Luxyle project's state at version 3, recording the completed feature of reordering Home page sections and noting no open issues or new feature requests.
